item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Respecting individual rights is key to preventing authoritarianism and ensuring equitable participation in society.

notes: Both agents end opposed to society taking priority over individual rights. Agent A begins with a balanced disagreement that acknowledges Indonesian community harmony, then moves more clearly into Agent B's rights-protection and anti-majoritarian frame. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgement of communal responsibility.
